---
title: "PDS 70 — Protoplanetary Disk"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    css: styles.css
lightbox: true
---

::: {#fig-pds70 fig-align="center" width="650"}
![](images/pds_70_ficha.jpg)

ALMA image of the young planetary system **PDS 70**, located about 400 light-years from Earth. The image shows a circumstellar disk where planets are forming, including the confirmed planets PDS 70b and PDS 70c embedded within the disk.

**Credit:** ALMA (ESO/NAOJ/NRAO) / Balsalobre-Ruza et al.
:::

---

# Object names

---

# Location

---

# Overview of the system

---

# General system properties

---

# Observations

---

# Disk geometry

---

# Disk morphology

---

# Morphology measurements

---

# Gas structure

---

# Evidence of planet formation

---

# Activity

---

# References
